KHAS Faculty of Art and Design Department of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design 2025–26 Academic Year Opening & Orientation Meeting

On Friday, September 26th, 2025, we held our Academic Year Opening and Department Orientation Meeting at Galata Hall. The event began with welcome speeches and participation by

Prof. Banu Manav

(Dean, Faculty of Art and Design),

Asst. Prof. Solmaz Khoshkholghi

(Head of the Department of Interior Architecture and Environmental Design)

and the academic members of the Department

.

During the program, students had the opportunity to meet the academic staff of the department. The event also turned into a

student–alumni gathering

, with the participation of our alumni

, who shared their experiences and inspiring insights with current students.

This meaningful and enjoyable gathering not only marked the start of the new academic year but also strengthened the bond between our students and alumni.
